title: gentiana clusii subsp. alpina
intro: Gentiana clusii subsp. alpina, also known as the alpine gentian, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the gentian family that grows in alpine regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion and alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders. The health benefits of Gentiana clusii subsp. alpina include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Gentiana clusii subsp. alpina is typically prepared as a tincture or infusion, with herbal preparations often used to treat digestive issues and respiratory conditions.
